128x128_acceptance: accepted through official preprocessing: input and mask are read then resized with F.interpolate to config.data.sample_size
frame_count: Kubric source has 24 frames; official max_video_length=197 and temporal_window_size=85; loader temporal_padding pads short clips to 85 frames
gpu_availability: PAI GPU0-7 were idle at protocol audit time, each NVIDIA L20X with 143771 MiB total VRAM
mask_values: quadmask values 0 object, 63 overlap, 127 affected, 255 background; script quantizes and inverts internally for model mask tensor
num_inference_steps: script call currently hard-codes num_inference_steps=30 despite config field default 50
prompt_format: prompt.json with single bg key describing remaining scene, not object removal
protocol_resolution: official default sample_size=384x672; use this for pass1 unless memory blocker appears
resolution_caveat: source Kubric videos are 128x128; official output is 384x672. Metrics should compare at common resolution and record resize direction.
